description.value:
Benefit: Character gains two talents from the Tough hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list, and the character must meet all prerequisites: Damage Reduction Talent Tree: Damage Reduction 2/— or Damage Reduction 3/—. Energy Resistance Talent Tree: Energy Resistance (choose one type: Acid, Cold, Electricity, Fire, or Sonic/Concussion). Unbreakable Talent Tree: Remain Conscious, Second Wind, or Stamina.

Special: This feat may be selected multiple times. Each time it is selected, a different pair of talents must be chosen than the previous times.
